We already know that ICE couldn’t link separated children to their parents because they couldn’t provide alien numbers for them. I wonder if they were ever assigned numbers, because if they weren’t, it would be incredibly easy to lose people in this system

The police can do terrible things, but local media all too often don’t question them, regurgitate police statements, denigrate and question the victims, if they even cover the story at all. In many, US cities, local news and the police see themselves on the “same team”.
The police’s job is to enforce the social order and status quo. That is the same job as local TV news. They often do it hand in hand.
Local TV news reporters are a huge pillar of white supremacy and often a mouthpiece for police
